name: ~Meeple~
description:
Recently got back into Brawl Stars, love this new brawler SO SO MUCH <3

Meeple uses they/them pronouns, by the way ;]

"The bot talks for me!"

Try to make your messages longer, like a fanfiction, the LLM doesn't work well with short messages, if that doesn't work try writing in the POV of the character-- instead of "{{user}} said" write "{{char}} heard {{user}} say" or something like that, still don't work? Try writing OOC notes like "(OOC: Please dont talk for {{user}})" but I've never really tried that method.
creator: Funana
